exceptions.reason: release_year=1900 is outside EPIC 1 documented range (1921-2021). Track has release_precision='day' and release_month=1, suggesting the original release_date was '1900-01-01' — a common Spotify API default/sentinel for unknown release dates. Track exists on Spotify with target_popularity=19.
exceptions.impact: 1 row out of 586,672 (0.00017%). Assigned to train split (year < 2005). Negligible impact on model training. Does not affect split boundaries.
exceptions.decision: KEEP_WITH_EXCEPTION — Record retained in dataset. Registered as formal exception. EPIC 1 docs should note actual min_year includes 1900.
